name: academorix/order
purpose: Checkout aggregate — Order + OrderLine + OrderAdjustment for cart lifecycle plus signed adjustments (coupon, credit, discount, tax, fee).
capabilities: Order aggregate (ord_ prefix) — checkout root record
when_to_use: A tenant runs a checkout flow with cart, line items, and applied adjustments (discounts, taxes, fees).
when_not_to_use: For post-checkout money movement, use academorix/transaction. For issued invoices, use academorix/invoice.
